capabilities.name: navigate
capabilities.description: Navigate to a URL and wait for the page to load

capabilities.name: click
capabilities.description: Click an element on the current page

capabilities.name: type
capabilities.description: Type text into an input field

capabilities.name: get_map
capabilities.description: Generate a numbered map of interactive elements and draw visual labels on the screen for identification

capabilities.name: click_id
capabilities.description: Click an element using its GAIA numeric ID (from get_map).

id.description: The numeric ID of the element.

capabilities.name: type_id
capabilities.description: Type text into an element using its GAIA numeric ID (from get_map).

id.description: The numeric ID of the element.

capabilities.name: scrape_id
capabilities.description: Scrape text from an element using its GAIA numeric ID (from get_map).

id.description: The numeric ID of the element.

capabilities.name: scrape
capabilities.description: Extract text or HTML from the page using a selector

capabilities.name: press_key
capabilities.description: Press a key on the keyboard (e.g., Enter, Tab, Escape)

capabilities.name: find_element
capabilities.description: Find an interactive element by text or placeholder and return its numeric ID.

query.description: Text or placeholder to search for
